songs.title: MONO CONTACT — SPES-R (Functional Minimal Techno)
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[Functional Minimal Techno with a raw, clinical, and restrained sensual undertone.
Sensuality must be purely physical and implicit, emerging only from friction, proximity, repetition, and pressure.
No emotion, no expression, no narrative intent.
Sound should feel close, dry, intimate, and mechanical, like bodies moving in a confined dark space.
Designed as a professional DJ tool for underground clubs and long endurance sets.
Minimal without emptiness, sexual without softness, controlled without drama.]

songs.title: Emendou - Deep Tech Minimal Spiritual | Deep melodic house & techno journey
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[Deep Tech Minimal Spiritual | Deep melodic house & techno journey | Sequential execution system with live energy automation | Designed for multi-layer integration and polyrhythmic coexistence. Each instrument acts as an orbital frequency around a living pulse. Late-night to sunrise club ritual with Brazilian urban rap fusion.]

[PARAMS:]
[BPM: 122–124]
[KEY: G minor → G Dorian (final lift)]
[DURATION: long-form journey | 3 Drops | BAR-based structure only]
[MOOD: sensual, ascendant, precise, transcendent, cinematic underground, late-night to sunrise]

songs.title: OME - Melodic Techno
songs.tags: At 124 BPM, this Melodic Techno track opens with atmospheric pads and fractured polyphonic choir harmonies, shot through with jazz-infused sax stabs, Cajun accordion flickers, and dub-afrobeat percussion. Deep kick and elastic sub bass anchor fast repetitive Detroit-techno rhythms, while arpeggiated synths pulse and swirl between speakers in dynamic stereo, entwined with granular, reversed FX and found sounds. Steampunk metallic taps, ethio-jazz melodic phrasings, and mysterious sampled field layers create organic growth—layers dissolve, morph, and reemerge, with smooth, spatial transitions and no abrupt changes. Mix is clean, emotionally deep, with tight compression and evolving textures.

songs.title: Melodic Resonance | OME Melodic Techno | 126 BPM
songs.tags: Pulsing at 126 BPM, the track opens with a deep kick and rolling techno bassline, wrapped in modular synth textures. Evolving arpeggios, lush cinematic pads, and spatial FX drift independently in 3D audio space. Expressive sax and violin trade emotional leads as cello anchors with warm harmonies. Organic percussion and automated panning elevate the hypnotic groove, while granular echoes and dynamic layers create a constantly shifting euphoric atmosphere, each instrument precisely placed in the mix.

songs.title: The Best
songs.tags:
[Artist: Aviciii]
[Genre: Progressive House, Melodic House, Anthem House. The iconic sound of euphoric, stadium-sized dance music.]
[INSTRUMENTATION: The absolute centerpiece and heart of the track is a simple, beautiful, and incredibly catchy acoustic piano riff that provides the main melodic hook. A powerful, punchy, four-on-the-floor kick drum drives the track, creating a signature 'pumping' sidechain feel. The drop unleashes a massive, soaring, and euphoric layered supersaw synth lead that plays the main melody. The sound is often blended with organic, folksy elements like acoustic guitar strums.]
[VOCALS: A soulful, heartfelt, and often folksy male or female vocal. The delivery is crucial: it is emotional and genuine, with a touch of Americana or soul, not a generic, over-the-top diva performance. The voice carries the human, story-telling element of the track.]
[PRODUCTION: Polished,clean, and massive. The structure is a classic, patient build-up leading to a powerful,cathartic].

songs.title: Quando a Luz Te Derrubou
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[Progressive deep house / melodic house.]
[Spiritual storytelling through emotional observation.]
[Female narrator witnessing the suffering, fall, and calling of Paul (Acts 9).]
[Night-driving energy. Inner prayer disguised as dance music.]
[Tempo steady, hypnotic, emotional evolution over repetition.]

[VOICE PERSONA — FEMALE LEAD:]
[Register: low alto to mezzo-soprano (G3–C5)]
[Timbre: warm (9), intimate (9), slightly smoky (6), emotional restraint (10)]
[Dynamics: subtle — pain held back, never exploded]
[Breath: constant presence, almost touching the mic]
[Vibrato: minimal, controlled]
[Attack: soft consonants, elongated vowels]
[Persona imagery: mulher que ama Paulo em silêncio, observando sua queda, cegueira e transformação à distância.]

songs.title: 1) HYBRID SUNSET CLUB WEAPON 001  (House / Melodic Tech / UK nostalgia)
songs.tags:
Electronic House + Melodic Club Tech designed for warm stereo pads, analog-style groovy bass, nostalgic chord swells, and minimal UK-garage syncopation.
Aims for an emotional sunset-to-midnight atmosphere with modern transient punch, clean low-end mono integrity, and smooth stereo expansion above 300 Hz.
Textural luxury meets dancefloor function: warm, deep, elegant, uplifting, slightly melancholic, yet fully club-driven.
The overall sonic identity must feel international, refined, and premium — suitable for sunset rooftops, luxury lounges, and peak-hour melodic house sets

songs.title: SPES – Deep Tech Minimal Spiritual Rap Journey (Letra Hungria Inteira)
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[Deep Tech Minimal Spiritual | Deep melodic house & techno journey |
Late-night → sunrise ritual energy |
Brazilian urban rap over hypnotic minimal groove |
Layered atmospheres, evolving pads, warm sub, glassy arps |
Sequential execution with live energy automation |
Polyrhythmic coexistence — every element orbits a central living pulse.]

[PARAMS:]
[BPM: 122–124]
[KEY: G minor → G Dorian final lift]
[DURATION: long-form journey | 3 Drops | bar-based structure]
[MOOD: nocturnal, sensual, ascendant, emotional, urban-lux, cinematic-underground]
[NEGATIVE_PROMPT: avoid EDM supersaws, big-room clichés, pop feel, dense compression, chaotic layers.]

[CORE LAYERS MAP — 12 STEMS]
[1 KICK_deepmono] [2 SUB_floorwarm] [3 BASS_drivefunk] [4 HATS_microtight]
[5 CLAP_roomdeep] [6 PERC_sync_tribal] [7 ARP_glass_melodic]
[8 LEAD_motion_airy] [9 PAD_breath_spiritual] [10 FX_grainmotion]
[11 GLITCH_spark] [12 RISER_engine_lift]

songs.title: Melodic Resonance | OME Melodic Techno | 126 BPM
songs.tags: Pulsing at 126 BPM, the track opens with a deep kick and rolling techno bassline, wrapped in modular synth textures. Evolving arpeggios, lush cinematic pads, and spatial FX drift independently in 3D audio space. Expressive sax and violin trade emotional leads as cello anchors with warm harmonies. Organic percussion and automated panning elevate the hypnotic groove, while granular echoes and dynamic layers create a constantly shifting euphoric atmosphere, each instrument precisely placed in the mix.

[INSTRUMENTATION]  
[Deep rolling sub-bass]  
[Analog synth bass with warm distortion and saturation]  
[Tribal percussion: toms, shakers, glitch-driven snares]  
[Ethereal floating pads with granular textures and reverb tails]  
[Airy melodic leads with slight detune and holographic shimmer]  
[Vocal textures: female whispers, vocoder fragments, reversed chants]  
[Glitch textures, spectral risers, fractal harmonic FX]  
[Laser stabs, data noise sweeps, binaural drones]

songs.title: Neon Symphony (Remix)
songs.tags: The track opens with dark, textural synth beds and cinematic field recordings, gradually building through polyrhythmic percussion and dynamic, pulsating basslines. Euphoric polyphonic pads swirl over an evolving groove, as atmospheric techno elements blend with organic layers. A standout violin or sax solo, drenched in spatial reverb and rhythmic delay, emerges at the peak, weaving through intricate harmonic layers. The arrangement morphs progressively, driving energy with precise EQ and sidechain, then dissolves into lingering pads and airy textures for a futuristic, emotional close.
